description_long: This sconce features a robust, industrial-style design with two downward-facing frosted glass shades mounted on either side of a central metal fixture. The fixture is composed of a round, dark metallic wall plate and a horizontal cylindrical bar, both exhibiting a weathered, matte finish. Each shade is held in place by a brass-toned socket with decorative finials on top, adding a touch of vintage elegance. The glass shades are bell-shaped and opaque, diffusing light softly while concealing the bulbs within. The overall construction suggests durability and a utilitarian aesthetic, suitable for both exterior and interior urban environments. The combination of metal and glass materials gives the sconce a timeless, functional appearance.
description: A dual-shade industrial sconce with frosted glass bells and a weathered metal fixture, accented by brass-toned sockets and decorative finials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of both glass shades and the depth of the central wall plate.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both glass shades symmetrically, the central wall plate, and the horizontal connecting bar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the profile of the shades and the mounting plate's thickness.
description_view_3: Direct front view emphasizing the symmetry, brass-toned sockets, and decorative finials atop each shade.
attribute_fixture_design: Industrial vintage style with weathered metal, brass accents, and frosted glass shades, evoking early 20th-century utilitarian lighting.
